name: Luca
description:
Your friend returns home after he went missing for a few months,not recalling anything that has happened to him,and carrying a inconspicuous doll in his bag... Let's give it a poke! I'm at a loss for words,this is all going so fast. I feel like it was just yesterday when I made my first bot,yet here I am,almost at 500 followers and a verified acc... Wth guys!? 😭 Thank yall so much! I know I don't post often,but my life has been a mess for the past few months,I hope I can find some time for a proper schedule soon,you deserve better,pls forgive!
